nl_query: For each board in EVAL_IN_PROGRESS status, show the course code, total scripts, number of scripts in each evaluation status, the board coordinator name and honorarium weight, and the number of calendar days remaining until the deadline.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS academic_unit_code, COUNT(a.id) AS total_scripts, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_not_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_in_progress, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'FROZEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_submitted, b.board_coordinator_name, b.honorarium_weight, COUNT(CASE WHEN ac.cal_date BETWEEN b.created_at::DATE AND b.deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS days_remaining_until_deadline FROM academic_unit au JOIN board b ON au.id = b.course_id JOIN answer_script a ON a.course_id = b.course_id AND a.exam_id = b.exam_id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id JOIN academic_calendar ac ON ac.academic_year = b.academic_year WHERE b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' GROUP BY au.code, b.board_coordinator_name, b.honorarium_weight ORDER BY au.code, days_remaining_until_deadline DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.board_coordinator_name, board.honorarium_weight, board.board_coordinator_name, board.honorarium_weight, board.academic_year. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
